name: Class: TestStimulus
title: Class: TestStimulus
description: This class can be used to generate a specific value pattern for a signal or an environment variable for stimulating a device.
tables: Note The methods are linked to the description of the corresponding CAPL function.
CreateRamp (limits taken from database); CreateRamp (limits user-defined)
CreateToggle (limits taken from database); CreateToggle (limits user-defined)
